match.userMessage:
Locked-off eye-level macro close-up. Scarlett's hand swipes coral lipstick smoothly across her lower lip then blots once with a tissue. Natural window light holds steady with clean directional shadows shifting subtly across warm skin tones. Shallow depth of field keeps sharp focus on the lips while the vanity background stays softly blurred.

Ambient sounds: soft natural studio room tone with faint window breeze.
